ground_truth.description: Person holds beer glass but does not drink. No tilt, no mouth contact.

mock_response.reason_short: Glass is not tilted at a drinking angle, container rim does not appear to be in contact with the lips.

last_run.reasoning: Frame 1 (0.0s): Glass held vertically, mouth not near rim. Frame 2 (2.3s): Glass tilted (>20°), mouth near rim but not confirmed contact. No liquid flow/swallowing motion. Beer fill level is full, but absence of rim-to-lips contact and lack of liquid flow disqualifies first sip. Holding near mouth without contact is not drinking.
last_run.reason_short: Glass is tilted but rim is not in contact with lips; no liquid flow/swallowing motion observed.
